Programs

Court Office Services

MENU

In the units within our judicial system, law offices, and legal services of businesses, the need for qualified personnel trained in this field is steadily increasing. The aim of our program is to equip our students with professional skills through theoretical and practical education, and to prepare them as qualified human resources to meet the needs of our judicial system, businesses, and the legal services of banks. While our program focuses on legal education, we also organize educational programs, trips, and workshops aimed at enhancing the personal development of our students. Our program aims not only to train good legal professionals but also to cultivate good individuals.

Graduates of our program can be appointed to positions within the judiciary, such as Enforcement Office Director, Deputy Enforcement Office Director, Chief Clerk, Deputy Chief Clerk, and Court Clerk. They can also hold various positions in correctional institutions, ranging from correctional officer to director; and they can work in various roles in trade registry offices. Additionally, they can be employed in the enforcement tracking offices of businesses and banks, notary offices, and law firms.

Duration of Education:

2 Years
